title: Aberdeen Group Qualifications and Peter S. Kastner Biography (1997)
author: Peter S. Kastner / Aberdeen Group
abstract: A 1997 qualifications and biography document for Aberdeen Group and Peter S. Kastner in his role as Group Vice President of Corporate Computing. It describes Aberdeen's service offerings and Kastner's expertise in OLTP, client/server, distributed systems, and benchmark auditing. The document establishes his prior career history at Digital Equipment, Prime Computer, Stratus Computer, and Arthur D. Little.
importance_rationale: Primary source documenting Kastner's professional standing and credentials in 1997; useful for understanding Aberdeen's market positioning and Kastner's analytical focus at his Group VP career stage.
relevance_rationale: Relevant to understanding the organizational and analytical context for Aberdeen Group research produced in the late 1990s.
prescience_rationale: Biography/credentials document; prescience is not a primary dimension.
